text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm out for a walk when I hear a<n>familiar voice
beneath an overpass. I<n>head down to check it out
and find...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And I recommend using official light<n>sticks! With
generic ones, you run the<n>risk of them being either
too big or too<n>bright!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Also, be careful not to wave them<n>around too
much or it can totally kill<n>the mood!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Students
text_block_list.text: Okay! You really do know everything!
choice_data_list: What are you all up to?
What are you all up to?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! These middle schoolers<n>asked me to
teach them the finer<n>points of enjoying a winning
concert!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text:
We only just got into Umamusume<n>racing, so
we've got no idea what to<n>do!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text:
We heard Digital's a master of all<n>things fangirl,
so we asked her to<n>take us under her wing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, everyone, let's get back to<n>training! Now,
picture the venue in<n>your heads...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Feel the unifying force of the concert!<n>The feeling
of not only you... but all<n>the fans and all your faves
celebrating together!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text:
R-right! When we wave our lights, we<n>should sync
our breathing with the<n>people around us and
create one<n>giant wave!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not just that, but when you're<n>listening to the
music, it's important<n>that you listen with intent! I
recommend that you watch some<n>recordings of
the songs to prep for<n>the live experience!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text: To... prep... Gulp!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Next topic! Let's see, next up is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I think that about covers all<n>the basics.
Sooo... how do you guys<n>feel?

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Whew... You really are amazing. It's<n>like you've
dedicated your whole life<n>to this...

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text: On the other hand, the two of us are<n>total newbs...

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text:
We're not qualified to even go to a<n>winning
concert!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Qualified, hmmm... You know, it's not<n>like I'm
particularly qualified either.

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! Not even with all your<n>knowledge and
experience?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not in that way! What I'm saying is<n>there's no
such thing as being<n>qualified!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All I want to do is come together with<n>my oshis
and the other fans to make<n>a performance
overflowing with love!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I just love my faves—my oshis—with<n>everything
I've got!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
When simping, you don't need<n>anything else.
There are no special<n>qualifications!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text: Love... I wonder if we have it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Do you have it? It's practicallygushing out of you.

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It took courage to come and talk to<n>me. You have
passion for concerts in<n>your hearts... And all of
that is love.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Knowing the two of you will be out<n>there cheering
on the Umas with me<n>is just... the best feeling
ever!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text: We'll never forget our love for<n>Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Gwehehe... You two are up to your<n>necks in the
ocean that is Uma<n>simping! ♪
choice_data_list:
It looks like the hatchlings are ready to leave the
nest.

From here on out, we can all enjoy the concerts
as fellow fans!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I think that's all I really<n>have to
teach... But honestly, you two<n>were ready from the
very start!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text:
There's no way that's true! But<n>thanks to you,
now we have the<n>confidence to get out there!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Next time we meet will definitely be at<n>a concert!
Um... I can't wait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Me too... I'm gonna deepen my own<n>love for
Umamusume even more!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Let's enjoy the otaku life together!<n>...Hehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's smile seems a bit<n>different after
speaking with the kids.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, now there's one more thing to<n>look forward
to at concerts, huh? ♪

text_block_list.name: Middle School Boy
text_block_list.text:
About that... Actually, I... I want to simp<n>for you,
Digital!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Me too! Your sincere love for<n>Umamusume is so
wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, um, mmm.... Me?! You know<n>there's plenty of
Umamusume cuter<n>than me out there, right?!

text_block_list.name: Middle School Girl
text_block_list.text: I love how humble you are too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I-I-I... I'm really happy to hear that!<n>But still! What
do I do?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital continues to squirm<n>under the
passionate gazes of her<n>new fans!
